item.title: Neighbors call security on my “illegal” military truck
item.description: I moved my square body for a quick favor, left it parked for 40 minutes, and somehow a neighbor still called security over “no tag.”

media:content.media:title: Neighbors call security on my “illegal” military truck
media:content.media:description: I moved my square body for a quick favor, left it parked for 40 minutes, and somehow a neighbor still called security over “no tag.”

item.title: The new ship horn is huge
item.description: In this video I a look at a new ship horn I'll install on my truck

media:content.media:title: The new ship horn is huge
media:content.media:description: In this video I a look at a new ship horn I'll install on my truck

item.title: How much did I spend on this truck?
item.description: BERTRAND850 shares a look at the truck and the cost behind it.

media:content.media:title: How much did I spend on this truck?
media:content.media:description: BERTRAND850 shares a look at the truck and the cost behind it.

item.title: Here's how I wrapped my entire truck for $100
item.description: A lot of people thought this wrap cost thousands, but I actually found a leftover roll online and had a local shop install it for way less than most places charge. In this video I explain how I found the material, what the install cost, and why this wrap turned out to be my favorite one yet. The matte metallic military green looks completely different depending on the lighting, and the truck finally has the look I was going for without spending a fortune. If you’ve ever wanted to wrap your truck but thought it was too expensive, this might help.

media:content.media:title: Here's how I wrapped my entire truck for $100
media:content.media:description: A lot of people thought this wrap cost thousands, but I actually found a leftover roll online and had a local shop install it for way less than most places charge. In this video I explain how I found the material, what the install cost, and why this wrap turned out to be my favorite one yet. The matte metallic military green looks completely different depending on the lighting, and the truck finally has the look I was going for without spending a fortune. If you’ve ever wanted to wrap your truck but thought it was too expensive, this might help.

item.title: What is wrong with my truck?
item.description: My truck keeps dying… I think I found the problem

media:content.media:title: What is wrong with my truck?
media:content.media:description: My truck keeps dying… I think I found the problem

item.title: Would I Buy Bad Boy Maverick Mower Again?
item.description: I’ve owned this zero turn mower for six months and put it to work mowing my property regularly. In this video, I share what I like, what I’d change, and whether I would buy it again after real-world use. If you’re considering a zero turn for your property, hopefully this helps you decide.

media:content.media:title: Would I Buy Bad Boy Maverick Mower Again?
media:content.media:description: I’ve owned this zero turn mower for six months and put it to work mowing my property regularly. In this video, I share what I like, what I’d change, and whether I would buy it again after real-world use. If you’re considering a zero turn for your property, hopefully this helps you decide.

item.title: Neighbors had my squarebody towed because it's an eyesore?

item.title: Turning My Tractor Into a Land Clearing BEAST
item.description: Clearing brush and reclaiming land on the homestead just got a whole lot easier! In this video I show how I transformed my tractor into a true land clearing BEAST using the Baumalight MP348 forestry mulcher.

media:content.media:title: Turning My Tractor Into a Land Clearing BEAST
media:content.media:description: Clearing brush and reclaiming land on the homestead just got a whole lot easier! In this video I show how I transformed my tractor into a true land clearing BEAST using the Baumalight MP348 forestry mulcher.

item.title: Turo Jeep Checkout
item.description: Turo can be fun at times, but it also can be really stressful depending on how good your guests are. #turo #rental #jeep #cars
